# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

RUN apt-get update -y && \
    apt-get install -y software-properties-common python3 python3-pip curl wget git vim unzip build-essential \
    libmysqlclient-dev libpq-dev postgresql postgresql-contrib libxml2-dev libxslt1-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libffi-dev libssl-dev libffi6 libffi3 libssh2-1 libssh2-1-dev libssh-gcrypt libssh-gcrypt4

RUN pip3 install --upgrade pip
